investigation_summary: OSHA / SOC analyses cite warehouse injury rates roughly double industry averages. NLRB findings on organizer retaliation; historic Chris Smalls firing reversed. FTC 2023 Amazon retail monopoly case + Prime dark-pattern case. Ring disclosed thousands of police footage shares without warrant (Senate inquiry). FTC $25M children's Alexa voice-data penalty (2023). Carbon up ~40% 2019–2022 despite Climate Pledge. Massive state/local incentives (Good Jobs First).

profile.tax_summary: 2018: $0 federal income tax on ~$11.2B profit (ProPublica analysis). 2023 federal effective ~12% vs 21% statutory. Luxembourg routing; IRS ~$1.5B transfer pricing dispute (SEC). >$4.7B state/local incentives (Good Jobs First). Bezos Washington→Florida move — documented state tax savings in press.
profile.legal_summary: FTC 2023 monopoly complaint (Project Nessie allegations) + Prime cancellation UX case. NLRB unlawful interference pattern. Ring 2022 — law enforcement video sharing without user consent/warrant per congressional letters. Alexa COPPA penalty $25M (2023). Marketplace counterfeits repeatedly flagged by regulators and plaintiffs.
profile.labor_summary: Strategic Organizing Center 2022: serious injury rate 6.6/100 vs 3.3/100 warehousing baseline. TOT surveillance disciplining breaks. Delivery DSP contractor model. Whole Foods covert union monitoring reported. $15–20/hr ware-house base — below living wage in major metros.
profile.environmental_summary: Absolute emissions +40% 2019–2022 vs Climate Pledge baseline per company sustainability reporting cited in critiques. Packaging improvements partial. Data-center water stress conflicts (VA, AZ) reported.
profile.political_summary: ~$21M federal lobbying (2023). Amazon PAC ~$2.7M (2022). Anti-PRO Act posture reported.
profile.product_health: Counterfeit and unsafe goods on marketplace — FTC and class actions. Children's Alexa retention — see legal.
profile.executive_summary: Jeff Bezos — Blue Origin, Washington Post; no criminal case in this record. Andy Jassy — cost focus post-boom.
